description: Step into luxury at Marca by Mortise, South Surrey. Former show home, Unit 2 is the former show home w/double wide garage & large driveway for 2 more vehicles. Chalet-inspired design, wood beams, smart home tech, A/C & iControl4 features. Feels like a house w/2300+sqft across 3 levels featuring many built-ins, custom shelving, new laminate flooring throughout, new carpets, newer light fixtures & fresh paint. Main offers white cabinetry, quartz counters, s/s appliances, gas range, island & SW exposure. Upstairs features 3 beds & flex, incl oversized primary w/w-i closet & ensuite w/double sinks. Downstairs includes large rec room w/custom bar, wine fridge & built-ins, plus 4th bed & storage. Enjoy 2 balconies or fenced yard.
